usually represents a unique individual prescriber (i.e., a prescribing provider), but can 
occasionally represent an entity or organization (e.g., a clinic or specialized unit of a hospital). 

From 2006–2013, when CMS privacy restrictions prohibited release of this variable, the CCW created a 
unique CCW prescriber identifier by cross walking all of the possible identifiers for each prescriber and 
assigning a CCW_PRSCRBR_ID to represent an individual medical practitioner. This allowed PDE
